title: Benefits Enrollment: Health Insurance and Dental Options
text:
Q: How do I enroll in health insurance and dental options?
A: Employees can enroll in health insurance and dental options during the annual open enrollment period, which typically occurs in November. If you are a new hire, you have 30 days from your start date to complete your enrollment. To enroll, log into the employee portal and navigate to the 'Benefits' section where you will find detailed information on available plans. You can compare different health and dental plans based on coverage and costs. If you need assistance, please contact the HR benefits team at hrbenefits@company.com or call extension 1234. After the enrollment period closes, changes can only be made during the next open enrollment or if you experience a qualifying life event, such as marriage or the birth of a child. Be sure to review your options carefully to ensure you select the best coverage for your needs.
